name: @aegis-wizard/cli
description: AEGIS Wizard — scaffold-wizard + knowledge-base + brief-generator CLI. Asks thorough questions, compiles answers + patterns into an agent-consumable Markdown brief for building institutional-grade Next.js + Supabase + shadcn SaaS in one day. Complementary
